text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Man, remember the Derby? That showdown
between BNW was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I bet all three of them have gotten even stronger
for the Kikuka Sho! It's gonna be so incredible!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can sense everyone's excitement even
from the waiting room!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin and Hayahide will be here too, so it's
gonna be just as great as the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I have to run a race that fires everyone up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will this race set the fans' hearts alight like the
Derby before it? We'll know soon enough,
because the Kikuka Sho is about to begin!
